# EthernetPort

## Tags
internet, network, connection, cable, lan, port, router, switch, hub, modem, web, online, networking, communication, socket, plug, slot, controller, connector, interface, console, signal, data, input, output

## Categories
communication, devices, multimedia, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/ethernet-port)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::EthernetPort;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        EthernetPort { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
